name: SUPER CAPSULE BOY
developer: Federal Game Company, Ahmet Uyanış Çevikkol, Merve Türkmen Çevikkol
short_description: Super Capsule Boy is a thrilling platformer where you conquer obstacles, collect coins, and explore hidden areas. Perfect for fans of fast-paced action and platform games!
detailed_description:
🚀 Super Capsule Boy: A modern take on classic platforming!

🌟 Jump, run, climb, and explore! Guide our capsule hero through challenging obstacles, collect coins, and reach the goal!

🔥 Endless fun, challenging levels!

  • Action-packed adventure experience

  • Smooth and precise controls

  • Hidden areas and exploration rewards

  • Perfect design for speedrunning

🎮 A perfect adventure for fans of Super Meat Boy, Celeste, and Mario!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Bulgarian, Danish, Indonesian, Dutch, Finnish, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Greek, Czech, Swedish
